message:
fix(newproj/screen_progress): tolerate missing STEP_STATUS entries under set -u

`render_progress_screen` iterates over `${STEP_ORDER[@]}` and, for each step,
counts it as complete when `STEP_STATUS[$step] == "success"`. Screens that do
not pre-populate STEP_STATUS for every step in STEP_ORDER (for example, when
rendering an initial frame before any step has run) caused the subscript to
expand to an unset associative-array entry. Under `set -u` — which the newproj
screens pipeline enables — that raises "unbound variable" and aborts the
render, leaving the user staring at a partial frame.

Use the `${var[$key]:-pending}` default expansion so an absent key is treated
as "not yet successful" (the same semantic the caller already intends) instead
of triggering an unbound-variable error. "pending" is used as the default
sentinel because it matches the step-status vocabulary used elsewhere in the
screen pipeline and is explicitly not "success", so the completion count is
unchanged for already-populated cases.

New bats case `render_progress_screen tolerates missing step status under
set -u` reproduces the failure mode: runs the renderer under `set -euo
pipefail` with `STEP_ORDER=(create_dir)` and an **empty** STEP_STATUS, with
the heavy renderer hooks stubbed so the test only exercises the subscript.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.7 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -146,7 +146,7 @@ render_progress_screen() {
     local total=${#STEP_ORDER[@]}
     local completed=0
     for step in "${STEP_ORDER[@]}"; do
-        if [[ "${STEP_STATUS[$step]}" == "success" ]]; then
+        if [[ "${STEP_STATUS[$step]:-pending}" == "success" ]]; then
             completed=$((completed + 1))
         fi
     done

@@ -583,6 +583,36 @@ teardown() {
     [[ "$name" == *"Git"* ]]
 }
 
+@test "render_progress_screen tolerates missing step status under set -u" {
+    run bash -c '
+        set -euo pipefail
+        export NEWPROJ_LIB_DIR="'"$ACFS_LIB_DIR"'"
+        source "'"$ACFS_LIB_DIR"'/newproj_screens.sh"
+        load_screens >/dev/null
+
+        TERM_HAS_UNICODE=false
+        TUI_GRAY=
+        TUI_PRIMARY=
+        TUI_SUCCESS=
+        TUI_ERROR=
+        TUI_NC=
+        BOX_CHECK=x
+        BOX_CROSS=!
+
+        render_screen_header() { :; }
+        render_progress() { :; }
+        log_info() { :; }
+
+        state_set "project_name" "demo-project"
+        STEP_ORDER=(create_dir)
+        STEP_STATUS=()
+
+        render_progress_screen >/dev/null
+    '
+
+    assert_success
+}
+
 @test "create_claude step skips when legacy Claude settings already exist" {
     source_lib "newproj_screens"
     load_screens
